entries.LogEntry:
I checked on prices for Top Golf and Fat Cats on Friday. It look like top golf provides a meal. I'm guessing they don't let you bring your own meal. If we want Top Golf it looks like we should go after lunch with no meal



Top Golf:

2 hours, 30 people - $700

Leaderboard - $100

Fajita Lunch - $1050

Total - 2135.73





Fat Cats (Bowling)

90 Minutes Bowling, 

(1) 60 Min Arcade Time Play Card, 

Large Pizza, & 

Drinks for 6.

1 lane



$99



So if we get 9 lanes for 900 that gives us 9 large pizzas and 3 people per lane





I'm open to other suggestions

entries.LogEntry:
Carl Sampson
ABN AMRO email

I do the following:

Reconfigure the working channel from Graph inbound nice_dta_1@nl.abnamro.com to SES, this simulates the outage.
Send a few new email messages into my outlook mailbox to which the channel was subscribed (it still is, API calls will be send out to you but the channel is not configured to use it anymore). This results in messages not making it to NICE as digital cases as expected
I restore the “outage” by configuring the channel back to its previous working state by selecting the subscribed nice_dta_1@nl.abnamro.com again. This worked 2 mins ago before doing step 1. But now it does not come back in a working state up until…..  I go the the “advanced settings” tab, select the parent object to which the subscription is a child, and just re-upload the same PFX file and settings we configured yesterday and then the channel starts working again. * puzzled *

This scenario we can’t document as a SOP for a PR situation.
entries.Subject: c2fbb4c5-4f62-4251-bd55-a7b09befae15
